0.title: ZooKeeperRequestLatencyMsMean

1.title: ZooKeeperRequestLatencyMsMean (by Broker ID)

2.title: ZooKeeperRequestLatencyMsMean Sum
2.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| sort arrayAvg(zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum) desc
| limit 20

4.title: ZooKeeperRequestLatencyMsMean Sum (by Broker ID)
4.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum_by_broker_id = avg(cloud.aws.kafka.zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum_by_broker_id), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| sort arrayAvg(zoo_keeper_request_latency_ms_mean_sum_by_broker_id) desc
| limit 20

5.title: ZooKeeperSessionState

6.title: ZooKeeperSessionState (by Broker ID)
